evals.prompt: Help me integrate @notifi-network/notifi-react into my React app. I already have Aptos wallet connectivity, and I want the smallest working NotifiCardModal setup first.
evals.expected_output: Chooses the NotifiCardModal path, wires NotifiContextProvider into the existing app structure, reuses the app's existing Aptos wallet state for on-chain auth, adapts signing from the current wallet adapter, and asks for missing runtime values (tenantId, cardId) only when they are required.

evals.prompt: I do not want NotifiCardModal. Help me build a custom notification preferences panel with notifi-react contexts. It should at least support login, topic display, and target toggling.
evals.expected_output: Chooses the custom context integration path, uses the correct Notifi React contexts for auth, topics, and targets, and avoids pushing the packaged card UI.

evals.prompt: I am using Google OIDC login, not a blockchain wallet. Help me integrate NotifiContextProvider with the off-chain auth path.
evals.expected_output: Chooses OFF_CHAIN auth, asks for or reuses a stable user identifier and signIn flow, and does not incorrectly require wallet-based signing.
